title: 126 MLAs-elect in T.N. have criminal cases pending against them; TVK tops list with 41
description: As many as 19 MLAs-elect from the TVK, 14 each from the AIADMK and the DMK, two each from the Congress and the PMK, and one each from the AMMK, the CPI, the DMDK, the IUML, and the VCK have declared that serious criminal cases were pending against them
